generated_oml:
instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with controller for research and educational purposes in a controlled laboratory setting"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory setting for research and education"
    base:contains LabScaleGantryCraneSystem
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing crane state data in lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data stored in TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based application for logging crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies for deployment of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for digital twin architecture description (context and container diagrams)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContainerizationEnabler
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for efficient crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for storage and analysis of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to maintain accuracy between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control action for efficient crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for storage and analysis of operational data"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insight for crane state visualization"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for maintaining accuracy between physical and digital systems"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application are sent through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture is defined using the C4 Model, specifically context and container diagrams, to illustrate system boundaries, components, and their relationships within the cyber-physical gantry crane system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter-service communication is handled by an MQTT Broker, connecting services such as Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, Dashboard, and Logging Application. Network topology details, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]
